“The Hypo-Chondri-Cat”, directed by Chuck Jones, was released on this day in 1950. Hubie and Bertie trick Claude Cat into thinking he’s sick. This includes a surreal dream sequence where they play surgery on him. Definitely a Warner Bros. cartoon where they play around with dark humor.
